column.text:
• Atlanta Braves placed RF Ronald Acuña Jr. on the 10-day injured list with a strained left hamstring.
• Los Angeles Angels placed C Sebastián Rivero on the 10-day injured list with a left hamate fracture.
• Seattle Mariners placed RHP Matt Brash on the 15-day injured list with a right lat strain.
• Los Angeles Angels transferred RHP Jack Kochanowicz to the 60-day injured list with right elbow inflammation.
• Atlanta Braves designated RHP Carlos Carrasco for assignment.
• San Francisco Giants designated LF Will Brennan for assignment.
• Toronto Blue Jays activated RHP Max Scherzer from the 15-day injured list.
• Detroit Tigers sent RHP Kenley Jansen on a rehab assignment to Toledo Mud Hens.
• Seattle Mariners activated 3B Miles Mastrobuoni from the 60-day injured list.
• San Francisco Giants activated LHP Reiver Sanmartin from the 60-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
